RuntimeStack.Language: TypeScript; exact compiler version is owned by package.json devDependencies.
RuntimeStack.Runtime: Bun; minimum runtime is owned by package.json engines and packageManager.
RuntimeStack.CliFramework: citty for the vvoc command tree and argument parsing.
RuntimeStack.ModuleFormat: ES modules via package.json type module.

Package.Name: @osovv/vv-opencode
Package.BuildOutput: dist/ is generated by bun run build and must not be edited manually.

RuntimeDependencies.Dependency: @opencode-ai/plugin for typed OpenCode plugin factories, hooks, config mutation, and custom tool helpers.
@opencode-ai/sdk for OpenCode client types and runtime interactions used by Guardian and plugin logging.
@opencode-ai/plugin and @opencode-ai/sdk version 1.18.2 provide the modern TUI plugin API and SDK v2 context catalogs used by /context.
@opentui/core, @opentui/keymap, and @opentui/solid version 0.4.3 provide native TUI rendering, keymap types, and Solid JSX integration.
jsonc-parser for comment-tolerant config parsing and edits.
@clack/prompts for interactive init prompts and abort handling.

DevelopmentDependencies.Dependency: bun-types and @types/node for runtime type surfaces.
oxlint for source linting with denied warnings.
oxfmt for source formatting and format checks.
lefthook for local pre-commit and commit-msg hooks.

OpenCode.Global: OpenCode global config stays in OpenCode-managed configuration paths.
OpenCode.Project: Project-scoped OpenCode config is managed under .opencode/ inside the selected project root.
OpenCode.GlobalTui: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode/tui.json(c) stores dedicated OpenCode TUI settings and explicit TUI plugin entries.
OpenCode.ProjectTui: .opencode/tui.json(c) stores project-scoped TUI settings and explicit TUI plugin entries.
OpenCode.ModelFields: Supported OpenCode model-bearing fields may store vv-role:* references and are resolved by ModelRolesPlugin at runtime.

Vvoc.ManagedAgents: .vvoc/agents/*.md for project-scoped managed agent prompts, with global counterparts under the vvoc config home.
Vvoc.ManagedSkills: .vvoc/skills/*/SKILL.md for project-scoped managed skills, with global counterparts under the vvoc config home.

Scripts.Script: Compiles TypeScript with tsconfig.build.json, recreates dist, and copies workflow system instruction markdown into dist.
Runs typecheck, lint, fmt:check, and tests.
Builds dist, verifies root, server plugin, and default TUI subpath exports by importing generated files, then runs npm pack --dry-run.
Runs scripts/release-check.ts to validate package identity, package version, hosted schema id, schema config const, changelog presence, and latest changelog summary.
Runs scripts/release-bump.ts to guard a clean worktree, bump version, generate changelog, generate required AI release summary, update schema id, run release:check, commit, tag, and push.

TestingStack.ModuleLevel: bun test targeted files for lib, command, plugin, workflow, secrets, hashline, and release automation modules.
TestingStack.WaveLevel: bun run typecheck, bun run lint, bun run fmt:check, and bun test.
TestingStack.PhaseLevel: bun run check, bun run build, bun run pack:check, and bun run release:check when release or package consistency matters.
TestingStack.GraceValidation: bunx @osovv/grace-cli@rc lint --path . and bunx @osovv/grace-cli@rc status --path . validate GRACE 4 artifacts.

Observability.Logger: OpenCode app log through client.app.log plus bounded plugin-specific diagnostics where applicable.
Observability.RequiredFields: service, level, message, requestID, and sessionID when runtime context provides them.
Observability.Redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, raw tokens, or high-risk payloads outside bounded truncation policies.

OperationalConstraints.Constraint: Prefer existing project libraries and established repository patterns.
Use Bun commands for local project checks and bunx for grace-cli.
Do not edit generated dist output manually.
Root package exports and plugin subpath exports must stay valid unless an explicit breaking change is approved.
OpenCode TUI integration requires OpenCode 1.18.2 or newer and must use a default TuiPluginModule export registered in tui.json(c).
Publishing remains manual from terminal with npm publish; normal branch pushes must not publish the package.
README, .grace/graph, and .grace/verification must be updated with behavior, public API, setup, command, flow, or verification changes as applicable.
